name: Chicken Lickin'
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken parts and pat dry.
2. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Brown the chicken on all sides in the butter until cooked through.
4. Transfer the chicken to a slow cooker (6-quart or larger).
5. In the same skillet, combine the remaining ingredients except heavy cream: tomatoes, onion, mushrooms, garlic, salt, paprika, ginger, chili powder, and 3 tablespoons butter.
6. Mix well to ensure all seasonings are incorporated.
7. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the slow cooker.
8. Cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours, stirring occasionally.
9. Just before serving, stir in the heavy cream.
10. Serve hot over spaghetti or pasta of your choice.
